title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 620 至 925 行，共 925 行) ---
 620 |                 task_goal = first_user_msg[:100]  # 提取前100字符作为任务目标
 621 |                 summary_parts.append(f"任务: {task_goal}")
 622 | 
 623 |         # 2. 提取关键消息的实际内容
 624 |         key_content_count = 0
 625 |         for msg in messages:
 626 |             if key_content_count >= 5:  # 只提取前5条关键内容
 627 |                 break
 628 | 
 629 |             content = msg.get("content", "")
 630 |             if not isinstance(content, str):
 631 |                 continue
 632 | 
 633 |             role = msg.get("role", "")
 634 | 
 635 |             # 提取错误消息
 636 |             if any(keyword in content for keyword in ["Error", "错误", "Exception", "失败", "Traceback"]):
 637 |                 error_preview = content[:80].replace("\n", " ").strip()
 638 |                 summary_parts.append(f"错误: {error_preview}...")
 639 |                 key_content_count += 1
 640 | 
 641 |             # 提取关键决策（assistant 消息中的关键内容）
 642 |             elif role == "assistant" and len(content) > 20:
 643 |                 # 检测关键决策关键词
 644 |                 decision_keywords = ["已完成", "已创建", "已修改", "成功", "完成", "建议", "决策", "选择"]
 645 |                 if any(keyword in content for keyword in decision_keywords):
 646 |                     decision_preview = content[:80].replace("\n", " ").strip()
 647 |                     summary_parts.append(f"进展: {decision_preview}...")
 648 |                     key_decisions.append(decision_preview)
 649 |                     key_content_count += 1
 650 | 
 651 |         # 3. 统计数据作为补充
 652 |         stats_parts = []
 653 |         stats_parts.append(f"压缩了 {len(messages)} 条消息")
 654 |         if files_changed:
 655 |             stats_parts.append(f"{len(files_changed)} 个文件变更")
 656 |         if errors_encountered:
 657 |             stats_parts.append(f"{len(errors_encountered)} 个错误")
 658 |         if tools_used:
 659 |             stats_parts.append(f"使用 {len(tools_used)} 种工具")
 660 | 
 661 |         summary_text = "\n".join(summary_parts + ["统计: " + "，".join(stats_parts)])
 662 | 
 663 |         # 如果没有提取到任何关键内容，使用简化版摘要
 664 |         if not summary_parts:
 665 |             summary_text = f"使用{strategy.value}策略压缩了 {len(messages)} 条消息（无关键内容提取）"
 666 | 
 667 |         # 🔥 新增：检测任务状态（优先使用真实 Plan 状态）
 668 |         task_status = "in_progress"  # 默认值
 669 | 
 670 |         # 🔥🔥🔥 关键修复：优先检查 Plan 状态（真实数据源）
 671 |         if self.plan_manager and hasattr(self.plan_manager, 'is_plan_complete'):
 672 |             if self.plan_manager.is_plan_complete():
 673 |                 # Plan 已全部完成，强制使用 "completed" 状态
 674 |                 task_status = "completed"
 675 |                 print(f"   [Phase 3] ✅ 检测到 Plan 已完成，状态同步为 completed")
 676 |             elif self.plan_manager.has_incomplete_tasks():
 677 |                 # Plan 还有未完成的步骤，强制使用 "in_progress"
 678 |                 task_status = "in_progress"
 679 |                 print(f"   [Phase 3] ⏳ Plan 尚未完成，状态保持 in_progress")
 680 |         else:
 681 |             # 没有 plan_manager，使用推断逻辑（备用）
 682 |             if errors_encountered:
 683 |                 unresolved_errors = [
 684 |                     e for e in errors_encountered
 685 |                     if not (e.get("resolved", False) if isinstance(e, dict) else e.resolved)
 686 |                 ]
 687 |                 if unresolved_errors:
 688 |                     task_status = "in_progress"
 689 |                 else:
 690 |                     task_status = "completed"
 691 |             else:
 692 |                 task_status = "completed"
 693 | 
 694 |         return SessionSummary(
 695 |             session_id=f"session_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}_{len(messages)}",
 696 |             timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
 697 |             summary_text=summary_text,
 698 |             task_goal=task_goal or f"压缩策略: {strategy.value}",
 699 |             task_status=task_status,  # 🔥 使用检测到的状态
 700 |             f...
